docs.title: Ahmedabad Municipal Corporation vs Nawab Khan Gulab Khan & Ors on 11 October, 1996
docs.headline: with a reasonable measure of safety and security. That facility, which has matured into a right of the pedestrians, cannot be set at naught ... road is a permanent obstruction to free passage of traffic and pedestrians' safety and security. Therefore, it would be impermissible to permit
docs.author: K Ramaswamy
